description: We are a professional retailer who sells messenger bag, canvas backpack, sports bag, travel bag, backpacks, shoulder bags, handbag online. Hi to the classic with a tried and tested canvas and retro decro, LOSMILE offers you a simplistic but bulit spirit in the long term that you want to continue. We hope you like our product. Thank you! Product Features: Large Capacity The travel bag can carry all your essentials wherever you go. --Extension zipper: Open the extension zipper to get more space. - Durable canvas for a year of reliable use. - There is a strap and a handle on the top of the messenger, it can be used as a handbag, tote bag, shoulder bag, etc. --Multiple pockets make classification more convenient: 1 two-way zipper main pocket, 1 inner zipper pocket, 1 back zipper pocket, 2 side zipper pockets, 2 front zipper pockets, 2 front zipper pockets, 2 ID pockets. --Increase the durability and endurance of details, such as texture gun color material, gun D color word buckle, wear rubber seal, durable 16 Ann canvas material and exquisite workmanship, etc. - Comfortable to carry: Strong Velcro and adjustable shoulder straps improve comfort to carry - Two-way zipper, flexible opening and zipper. --Straps adjust the buckles: adjust the length to fit you perfectly. --Wash at ordinary temperature, hang to dry. - Perfect for gym, sports, work, travel, school and daily use. Package includes: -- 1 x LOSMILE Canvas Travel Bag How to maintain the canvas bag? - Wash with clean water at ordinary temperature. - Do not wash with hot water and alkaline detergent. - Hang to dry and store in a ventilated place instead of sun exposure. - Wash separately to avoid staining.
